data.body: AC amendment (Gap: missing_error_path): Add test case test_lock_cleanup_on_failure: Given lockfile acquired successfully + figma-merge.py mocked to return non-zero exit; When figma-resync.py runs; Then: lockfile is removed at /tmp/dso-figma-resync-<ticket>.lock, exit code is non-zero, no tag swap performed, no metadata comment added. Add this as test 8 in test_figma_resync.py.
